title: Challengers file for prosecutor, presiding commissioner
description: The filing period for the Aug. 4 Primary Election closed on March 31, with two local races and two state races seeing challengers. The post Challengers file for prosecutor, presiding commissioner appeared first on Cassville Democrat .

title: 2027 Elections: Coalition to political parties field credible candidates for Kosofe Reps
description: backs Oshinowo A coalition of civil society organisations in Kosofe has urged the All Progressives Congress (APC) and other contending parties to present credible candidates for the forthcoming general elections. The group made the call at a press conference held on Tuesday in Ketu, through its co-conveners, Comrade Alex Omotehinse of Centre for Human and [...] The post 2027 Elections: Coalition to political parties field credible candidates for Kosofe Reps appeared first on National Daily Newspaper .

title: Indiana gas sales tax could jump 6 cents in May
description: Indiana’s sales tax on gasoline is poised to jump by 6.1 cents per gallon in May if Gov. Mike Braun doesn’t extend his temporary suspension of the tax.

title: NHC to Acquire Thirty-Five NHI Facilities
description: MURFREESBORO, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--National HealthCare Corporation (NYSE American: NHC), a national leader in senior care, announced entry into a Purchase and Sale Agreement to acquire the real estate of thirty-two skilled nursing facilities and three independent living facilities from National Health Investors, Inc. and its affiliates (“NHI”). The purchase price is $560 million. NHC, through affiliates, has been leasing and operating the facilities under a Master Agreement to Lease with NHI

title: BCHS graduating class of 1976 holds 50th class reunion
description: The BCHS graduating class of 1976 had their 50th class reunion on April 17-18. The group met Friday night at Tequila’s Mexican Restaurant for a mixer and dinner. Saturday afternoon, the group toured the old Bridge City High School and new career tech building with Superintendent Dr. Mike Kelly. Mr. Kelly provided the group with a slideshow of the new performing arts center to be built over the nex...

title: Intuitive Announces First Quarter Earnings
description: SUNNYVALE, Calif., April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Intuitive (the “Company”) (Nasdaq: ISRG), a global technology leader in minimally invasive care and the pioneer of robotic-assisted surgery, today announced financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
